source_pr.title: br: support PiTR feature
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/29501

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
The new feature: PiTR
- Take a backup of key-value recored in TiKV If you  run `br log start ...`
- Restore table and record from snapshot-ts to restore-ts if you run `br restore point ...`

### Relative design/tests
- [Specification](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nr4Ubd5oKBK1mY6eqJtktTtaFvZ_6HxUZhMUQIuCCcw/edit#heading=h.m5g2iqfkn37v)
- [Design](https://pingcap.feishu.cn/docs/doccnMvA0vKi8cnzIb2fAfUC6nd)
- [Test plan](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tFXxjMQzLnSKf-MQyga7eb1H8DRmivD2kl3PQxpCVzM/edit?n=FD_342_Feature_test_plan)
  - [Issues record in development](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pa-L1JV1W0fZRy44fAnSOEPjdSlxEVYZviDh7arTey8/edit#heading=h.ujsh83watf91)
  - [Base test cases](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ryPfNryaFl9o2_We0oGzmGa3os2aus-cv-tqgBpses0/edit#gid=0)
 


### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Support the new feature of PiTR.
```

symptoms: +gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v3-unstable v3.0.0-20180810215634-df19058c872c/go.mod h1:3HH7i1SgMqlzxCcBmUHW657sD4Kvv9sC3HpL3YukzwA= | sort.Slice(fakeRawkvClient.kvs, func(i, j int) bool { (br/pkg/restore/rawkv_client_test.go)
failure_signature: +gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v3-unstable v3.0.0-20180810215634-df19058c872c/go.mod h1:3HH7i1SgMqlzxCcBmUHW657sD4Kvv9sC3HpL3YukzwA= | sort.Slice(fakeRawkvClient.kvs, func(i, j int) bool { (br/pkg/restore/rawkv_client_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it compared results without enforcing a deterministic order (the `fakeRawkvClient.kvs` slice order can vary). This PR stabilizes it by sorting the slice before assertions.
fix_pattern: Sort `fakeRawkvClient.kvs` with `sort.Slice` before assertions to enforce deterministic ordering.

evidence: evidence: +gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v3-unstable v3.0.0-20180810215634-df19058c872c/go.mod h1:3HH7i1SgMqlzxCcBmUHW657sD4Kvv9sC3HpL3YukzwA= | sort.Slice(fakeRawkvClient.kvs, func(i, j int) bool { (br/pkg/restore/rawkv_client_test.go)
